lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did the chief priests and elders secretly plan to do?
answers: Kidnap Jesus and take him to Egypt

questions.text: What did Judas do with the disciples’ money bag?
answers: He gave it all to the poor
He used the money to buy Jesus a gift

questions.text: Why was Judas upset that Mary poured perfume on Jesus?
answers: He wanted it sold so he could steal the money
He did not like the smell
He thought she was making a mess

questions.text: What did Judas agree to do for 30 silver coins?
answers: Help the chief priests and elders arrest Jesus
Help the chief priests and elders become disciples

questions.text: What did Jesus do in the garden of Gethsemane?
What prayer did Jesus pray three times?
answers: If possible, take away this suffering, but do what You want, not what I want
Send angels to fight for Me

questions.text: What did the disciples do when they were supposed to be praying?
Jesus was so troubled, his sweat was like... what?
Who did Judas bring to the garden to arrest Jesus?
What was Judas’ signal to the men?
answers: The one I kiss is Jesus
The one holding a lamp is Jesus
The one with the long beard is Jesus
The one wearing white is Jesus
